message:
test(fuzz,readwrite): add adjlist fuzz target and empty-parse edge-count assertions

Two related read-path hardening additions.

1) New libfuzzer target `fuzz_adjlist` at `fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_adjlist.rs`,
   wired into `fuzz/Cargo.toml` as a new `[[bin]]` entry. The target
   exercises `EdgeListEngine::read_adjlist` and `read_digraph_adjlist` in
   both strict and hardened modes with arbitrary UTF-8 input, ensuring
   the parser never panics regardless of what the fuzzer throws at it.
   Follows the same structure as the existing edgelist / graphml / gml
   fuzz targets.

   `.github/workflows/ci.yml` grows a corresponding 30-second fuzz step
   ("Fuzz adjlist parser (30s)") alongside the existing parser fuzzing
   steps, so every PR runs a brief smoke fuzz against the new target.

2) `crates/fnx-readwrite/src/lib.rs`:

   - The two empty-input regression tests for graphml and gml were only
     asserting `node_count() == 0` after reading an empty string. Add
     `edge_count() == 0` to both so a future bug that spuriously
     synthesized phantom edges on empty input would be caught.

   - The hardened-mode fuzz harness test was reusing three
     `EdgeListEngine::hardened()` instances across `read_edgelist`,
     `read_json_graph`, and `read_gml`, which gave us only three parse
     surfaces per fuzz iteration. Add a fourth engine for
     `read_adjlist` so the in-process fuzz test covers the same four
     parsers the new fuzz target exercises, and renumber the locals
     (`hardened`, `hardened2`, `hardened3`, `hardened4`) accordingly.

files.patch:
@@ -201,6 +201,8 @@ jobs:
         run: cd fuzz && cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_graphml -- -max_total_time=30
       - name: Fuzz GML parser (30s)
         run: cd fuzz && cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_gml -- -max_total_time=30
+      - name: Fuzz adjlist parser (30s)
+        run: cd fuzz && cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_adjlist -- -max_total_time=30
 
   g8-raptorq:
     name: G8 RaptorQ scrub

@@ -34,3 +34,8 @@ doc = false
 name = "fuzz_gml"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_gml.rs"
 doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_adjlist"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_adjlist.rs"
+doc = false
